papers.title: Video Generation Models are General-Purpose Vision Learners
papers.abstract: Abstract  Driven by next-token prediction, NLP shifted from task-specific models into powerful generalist foundation models. What, then, is the equivalent catalyst needed to achieve a general-purpose model in computer vision? In this paper, we contend that large-scale text-to-video generation serves as a strong pre-training paradigm for computer vision, providing the necessary spatiotemporal priors, vision-language alignment, and scalability required for general visual intelligence. We introduce GenCeption, which leverages a pre-trained video generative diffusion backbone to define a feed-forward perception model, capable of performing various vision tasks steered by text instructions. Empirical results demonstrate that GenCeption achieves state-of-the-art performance across a diverse suite of tasks, including depth, surface normal, and camera pose estimation, expression-referring segmentation, and 3D keypoint prediction, often matching or surpassing specialized models (e.g. DepthAnything3, SAM3, D4RT, VGGT-Omega, Sapiens, David, Genmo, and Lotus-2). Furthermore, the video generative pretrained backbone outperforms alternative pretraining paradigms (e.g., V-JEPA, and Video MAE) under comparable settings. Importantly, GenCeption exhibits preliminary data and model scaling properties along with exceptional data efficiency, where it achieves comparable performance with leading models like D4RT and VGGT-Omega with 7 to 500 less training data. Finally, GenCeption also exhibits intriguing emergent behaviors: a model trained exclusively on synthetic human videos generalizes to real-world footage and out-of-distribution object categories (e.g., animals and robots). These findings suggest that video generation is not merely a synthesis tool, but a foundational path toward generalist vision intelligence for the physical world. Project page: https://genception.github.io

ru.title: Видео-генерация как фундамент для универсального зрения
ru.desc: Статья предлагает новый подход к созданию универсальной модели компьютерного зрения, используя предварительное обучение на основе генерации видео с помощью диффузионных моделей. Авторы представляют GenCeption — модель, которая использует предварительно обученный видео-генеративный позвоночник для решения множества задач зрения, управляемых текстовыми инструкциями. Модель демонстрирует выдающиеся результаты в задачах оценки глубины, нормалей поверхности, позы камеры, сегментации и предсказания 3D-ключевых точек, часто превосходя специализированные модели. Кроме того, GenCeption показывает исключительную эффективность по данным, достигая сравнимую производительность с ведущими моделями при использовании в 7-500 раз меньше данных для обучения.

en.title: GenCeption: Pioneering Generalist Vision Intelligence through Video Generation
en.desc: This paper discusses the development of GenCeption, a model that uses large-scale text-to-video generation as a pre-training method for computer vision tasks. By leveraging a pre-trained video generative diffusion backbone, GenCeption can perform various vision tasks guided by text instructions, achieving state-of-the-art results. The model demonstrates impressive data efficiency, often requiring significantly less training data than specialized models while still matching or exceeding their performance. Additionally, GenCeption shows the ability to generalize from synthetic to real-world data, indicating its potential as a foundational model for general visual intelligence.

zh.title: 视频生成：通向通用视觉智能的基础
zh.desc: 本论文探讨了如何通过大规模文本到视频生成来实现计算机视觉的通用模型。我们提出了GenCeption，这是一种利用预训练视频生成扩散模型的前馈感知模型，能够根据文本指令执行多种视觉任务。实验结果表明，GenCeption在深度估计、表面法线、相机姿态估计等任务上表现优异，常常超越专门模型。我们的研究表明，视频生成不仅是合成工具，更是实现通用视觉智能的基础路径。

papers.title: Self-Guided Test-Time Training for Long-Context LLMs
papers.abstract: Abstract  Long-context processing has become increasingly important for large language models (LLMs), but simply extending the context window does not guarantee effective utilization of long inputs. As input length grows, accuracy often degrades, indicating that models still struggle to identify and use the evidence most relevant to a question. A promising way to improve long-context utilization is test-time training (TTT), which treats the test context as a training example for instance-specific parameter adaptation. However, applying TTT to the entire long context is prohibitively expensive, while adapting on randomly sampled spans introduces severe noise. Because most spans in a long context are irrelevant to the specific question, training on them may even degrade the base model's performance. Our preliminary study shows that TTT is highly sensitive to training-span quality: on LongBench-v2, TTT on randomly sampled spans hurts performance, whereas TTT on oracle spans substantially improves it. Motivated by this, we propose a simple method, Self-Guided TTT (S-TTT): before adaptation, the model identifies the evidence spans it should learn from, and the standard language-modeling training objective is applied only to those selected spans. On two challenging long-context reasoning benchmarks, LongBench-v2 and LongBench-Pro, S-TTT improves accuracy for both Qwen3-4B-Thinking-2507 and Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct, achieving up to a 15% relative improvement.

ru.title: Модель сама выбирает, что учить: адаптивное обучение на тестовом наборе
ru.desc: В работе предложен метод Self-Guided Test-Time Training (S-TTT) для улучшения способности большых языковых моделей работать с длинными контекстами. Авторы показали, что стандартное тестовое обучение на случайных фрагментах текста неэффективно и даже снижает качество модели, так как большинство фрагментов не содержат релевантную информацию. Ключевая идея S-TTT заключается в том, что модель сначала самостоятельно определяет, на какие части контекста ей следует обучаться, а затем применяет языковое моделирование только к выбранным фрагментам. Метод показал улучшение до 15% на бенчмарках LongBench-v2 и LongBench-Pro для различных моделей.

en.title: Enhancing Long-Context Processing with Self-Guided Training
en.desc: This paper addresses the challenge of effectively processing long contexts in large language models (LLMs). It highlights that simply increasing the context window does not improve accuracy, as models struggle to focus on relevant information. The authors introduce Self-Guided Test-Time Training (S-TTT), which allows models to identify and adapt to the most pertinent spans of text during inference. Their experiments show that S-TTT significantly enhances performance on long-context reasoning tasks by selectively training on high-quality evidence spans.

zh.title: 自我引导的测试时训练提升长文本处理效果
zh.desc: 长文本处理在大型语言模型中变得越来越重要，但仅仅扩展上下文窗口并不能保证有效利用长输入。随着输入长度的增加，模型的准确性往往会下降，表明模型在识别和使用与问题最相关的证据方面仍然存在困难。本文提出了一种自我引导的测试时训练方法（S-TTT），该方法在适应之前，模型会识别出应学习的证据范围，并仅对这些选定范围应用标准的语言建模训练目标。实验结果表明，S-TTT在两个长文本推理基准上显著提高了模型的准确性，最高可达15%的相对提升。

papers.title: A Sovereign, Open-Source Foundation Model for German and English
papers.abstract: Abstract  We present Soofi S 30B-A3B, a sovereign, open-source Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) hybrid Mamba Transformer foundation model for German and English. Its hybrid design activates only 3B of 30B parameters per token and keeps the inference cache near-constant as context grows, giving it a decisive throughput advantage over dense models for long-context, high-concurrency deployment. Pretrained on roughly 27 trillion tokens with deliberately up-weighted German, Soofi S matches dense 14 to 27B models on aggregate English and German benchmarks while achieving the best code aggregates in both languages among 17 open base models, and outperforms every European sovereign baseline in our comparison, including ones far larger in active parameters. Among fully open models, Soofi S obtains the highest English and German evaluation scores, ahead of Olmo 3 32B and Apertus 70B. Soofi S was built end-to-end on the German Industrial AI Cloud, a sovereign HPC scale AI infrastructure operated by Deutsche Telekom in Munich. Soofi S will be released under highly permissive, open-access terms: weights, selected intermediate checkpoints, full per-source data accounting, hyperparameters, and training and evaluation code. Where source licenses permit, data-construction artifacts are released under permissive licenses; commercially licensed sources are documented with aggregate statistics and exact mixture accounting.

ru.title: Европейская суверенная MoE модель с экономией параметров и ресурсов
ru.desc: Представлен Soofi S 30B-A3B — открытая гибридная модель на основе Mixture-of-Experts (MoE), объединяющая архитектуру Mamba и Transformer для немецкого и английского языков. Модель активирует только 3 миллиарда параметров из 30 миллиардов на каждый токен, что обеспечивает постоянный размер кэша при увеличении контекста и дает преимущество в пропускной способности для обработки длинных последовательностей. Предобученная на 27 триллионах токенов с усилением немецкоязычных данных, модель достигает производительности плотных моделей размером 14-27B и показывает лучшие результаты в задачах генерации кода среди 17 открытых базовых моделей. Soofi S была полностью разработана на немецкой суверенной облачной инфраструктуре AI, принадлежащей Deutsche Telekom, и будет распространяться с открытыми весами и полной документацией обучения.

en.title: Soofi S: Efficient Language Mastery with MoE Technology
en.desc: The paper introduces Soofi S 30B-A3B, an open-source Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) model designed for both German and English languages. This model utilizes a hybrid architecture that activates only a portion of its parameters during inference, allowing it to efficiently handle long-context tasks with high throughput. Pretrained on a massive dataset of 27 trillion tokens, Soofi S demonstrates competitive performance against larger dense models while achieving top scores in language benchmarks. It will be made available under open-access terms, promoting transparency and collaboration in AI development.

zh.title: Soofi S：高效的开源混合专家模型
zh.desc: 本文介绍了Soofi S 30B-A3B，这是一个主权的开源混合专家（MoE）混合Mamba Transformer基础模型，支持德语和英语。它的混合设计使得每个token仅激活30亿个参数中的3亿个，并在上下文增长时保持推理缓存近乎恒定，从而在长上下文和高并发部署中相较于密集模型具有显著的吞吐量优势。Soofi S在大约27万亿个token上进行了预训练，特别加强了德语的权重，在英语和德语的基准测试中与14到27亿的密集模型相匹配，并在17个开放基础模型中在两种语言的代码聚合上表现最佳。Soofi S将在高度宽松的开放访问条款下发布，包括权重、选定的中间检查点、完整的源数据核算、超参数以及训练和评估代码。

papers.title: Scalable Visual Pretraining for Language Intelligence
papers.abstract: Abstract  The rapid progress of large foundation models has been driven predominantly by pretraining on large-scale text corpora. However, many forms of knowledge are conveyed through visual representations, where figures, typeset equations, and page layouts carry rich information that cannot be faithfully or completely captured by text alone. Yet current pretraining approaches discard these visual cues by converting visually rich sources, such as documents and web pages, into plain text for learning language intelligence. This paper challenges the default assumption that language models must be trained on text-only representations and shows that Visual Pretraining is a scalable learner for foundation model intelligence. To this end, we conduct a systematic study of unsupervised visual pretraining paradigms that directly leverage visual documents without text extraction. Across multiple backbones and benchmarks, visual pretraining on the same underlying corpora consistently outperforms text-only pretraining, offering an efficient pathway to scalable language intelligence.
affiliations: University of Science and Technology of China

ru.title: Визуальное предобучение как основа для более мощных фундаментальных моделей
ru.desc: В этой работе авторы показывают, что модели-фундаменты можно обучать напрямую на визуальном представлении документов, вместо того чтобы конвертировать их в текст. Исследование демонстрирует, что визуальное предобучение на одних и тех же корпусах превосходит текст-ориентированные подходы, так как фигуры, формулы и макеты страниц содержат важную информацию. Авторы проводят систематическое изучение различных парадигм предобучения без использования текстовой экстракции из визуальных документов. Такой подход предлагает эффективный путь к масштабируемому обучению языковых моделей.

en.title: Unlocking Language Intelligence with Visual Pretraining
en.desc: This paper discusses the limitations of current language models that rely solely on text for training. It highlights the importance of visual information, such as figures and layouts, which are often lost when converting documents to plain text. The authors propose a method called Visual Pretraining, which utilizes visual documents directly, bypassing the need for text extraction. Their experiments show that models trained with visual pretraining outperform those trained only on text, suggesting a new direction for enhancing language intelligence.

zh.title: 视觉预训练：超越文本的智能学习
zh.desc: 这篇论文探讨了大型基础模型的快速进展主要依赖于大规模文本语料库的预训练。然而，许多知识通过视觉表现传达，图形、排版方程和页面布局包含丰富的信息，单靠文本无法完全捕捉。当前的预训练方法通过将视觉丰富的来源（如文档和网页）转换为纯文本来学习语言智能，从而忽视了这些视觉线索。本文提出视觉预训练是一种可扩展的学习方式，系统研究了直接利用视觉文档的无监督视觉预训练范式，结果显示视觉预训练在多个基准测试中优于仅文本预训练。
